title: Expanded Armor Enchantings
description: This Datapack and Mod allow to use Blast Protection, Fire Protection, Projectile Protection types on the same piece Armor!
body: # Expanded Armor Enchantings **This Datapack and Mod** expands the Armor's Protection Enchantments on the same piece Armor! **‎◾Examples:** ![Expanded Armor Enchantings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3f53a53c9bc6230b745b9275fbc8103653990c84.png) ![Expanded Armor Enchantings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/db2d858c23d4a0824b5bf3faff8ccdcdea5c5533.png) ## Details📝 - **Expanded Armor Enchantings** is **compatible** with versions **1.21 to 1.21.11** - **Expanded Armor Enchantings** adds new **(expansion)** to enchanting table🌐 - **Expanded Armor Enchantings** is compatible with any **enchantings datapacks** - **No** it is necessary to **unzip** the downloaded file 🗂️ ## More Projects:
